subject: [DCAE] Add automated review for snmptrap verify

Patch Set 1:

(2 comments)

Your change looks good.. however, if you guys depend on a path env variable it might be a little bit complicated. 
We could add in global jjb an "inject" to add a new env variable file. Like this:
https://github.com/lfit/releng-global-jjb/blob/master/jjb/lf-maven-jobs.yaml#L68

You will need to have a "onap-gerrit-review-env" file hosted in jjb/<your-repo-path> which will contain the optional path variable. However you will need to change it every time you need to by submitting a new change in that jjb file. 
Is this something that could work for you?

Can we run your script before running tox as a pre-build-script rather?

               post-build-script: ../../shell/onap-gerrit-review-wrapper.sh
To

               shell: ../../shell/onap-gerrit-review-wrapper.sh

Patch Set 3:

> Patch Set 3:
> 
> See following error on sandbox run- 
> 
> 17:40:04 [dcaegen2-collectors-snmptrap-tox-verify-master] $ /bin/sh -xe /tmp/jenkins5467816286450901938.sh
> 17:40:04 + ../../shell/onap-gerrit-review-wrapper.sh
> 17:40:04 /tmp/jenkins5467816286450901938.sh: 2: /tmp/jenkins5467816286450901938.sh: ../../shell/onap-gerrit-review-wrapper.sh: not found
> 17:40:04 Build step 'Execute shell' marked build as failure
> 
> Should the script be moved into sandbox env for testing this change?

So.. if you look at your configuration, notice that script box is not getting filled with the contents of the script.. but rather the location of the script. 

https://jenkins.onap.org/sandbox/job/dcaegen2-collectors-snmptrap-tox-verify-master/configure

You need to have this box filled with the actual contents of the script.. 
i think you need to use "!include-raw-escape:" 
You can see how this is used in other yaml files in ci-management.

Patch Set 3:

> 
> > Patch Set 3:
> > 
> > See following error on sandbox run-

> > 17:40:04 + ../../shell/onap-gerrit-review-wrapper.sh
> > 17:40:04 /tmp/jenkins5467816286450901938.sh: 2: /tmp/jenkins5467816286450901938.sh: ../../shell/onap-gerrit-review-wrapper.sh: not found
> > 17:40:04 Build step 'Execute shell' marked build as failure
> > 
> > Should the script be moved into sandbox env for testing this change?
> 
> So.. if you look at your configuration, notice that script box is not getting filled with the contents of the script.. but rather the location of the script. 
> 
> https://jenkins.onap.org/sandbox/job/dcaegen2-collectors-snmptrap-tox-verify-master/configure
> 
> You need to have this box filled with the actual contents of the script.. 
> i think you need to use "!include-raw-escape:" 
> You can see how this is used in other yaml files in ci-management.

Hmm okay. The wrapper script was intended to avoid the boilerplate code on all other job templates - would be good if there is way to source this script directly.

Meanwhile I reconfigured the job and attempted rerun - the job failed on different error due to validation script - will work with Tony to fix it before another retry.
Set Work In Progress
